text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The transition from an almost clinical, empty corridor to this vibrant, informative wall gives me pause. I am present at the intersection of safety, function, and the promise of human ingenuity. I wonder about the balance that exists between the mundane structures that keep us safe and the burst of creativity that propels us to innovate. I feel grounded, yet invited to question, to learn, and to reflect on the role of research and development in shaping our world.
